notes: v0.3.5: QoL fixes. (1) Window now opens at 680x900 centered instead of a tiny 800x600 — you can see the whole session screen without scrolling. Min size clamped to 520x600, still fully resizable. (2) Removed the cryptic avc1.42E01F codec label from next to the Video toggle — it was debug leftover from when we were troubleshooting H.264 fallback, and now that video works cleanly it's just noise. Codec still logged to devtools console if you need to check it.
